summary: Live-applied ADR 0255 from a rebased latest-origin/main worktree by converging Matrix Synapse on docker-runtime-lv3 with postgres-backed persistence, a Tailscale-only controller proxy on proxmox-host, public edge publication at matrix.example.com, and a matching monitoring replay that added HTTPS/TLS assurance coverage for the new public endpoint.

verification.check: Focused Matrix regression and repo validation slice
verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest -q tests/test_edge_publication_makefile.py tests/test_matrix_synapse_runtime_role.py tests/test_matrix_synapse_postgres_role.py tests/test_matrix_synapse_playbook.py tests/test_generate_platform_vars.py` returned `26 passed in 1.26s`; `make syntax-check-matrix-synapse` passed; and `uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/generate_https_tls_assurance.py --check`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/generate_dependency_diagram.py --check`, and `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/generate_diagrams.py --check` all passed.

`make pre-push-gate` passed on the rebased ADR 0255 head, including alert-rule validation, ansible lint and syntax, integration tests, data-model and policy validation, security scan, OpenTofu validation, type check, and YAML lint.

`make converge-matrix-synapse` completed successfully from source commit `450a8cde9b88c0f29e7c6feddcec5c38bf97667b` on top of `origin/main` commit `8871117b40466b7907a33992f44ca7d83a3e9409`, with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=128 changed=2 failed=0`, `localhost ok=18 changed=0 failed=0`, `nginx-lv3 ok=39 changed=5 failed=0`, `postgres-lv3 ok=51 changed=0 failed=0`, and `proxmox-host ok=31 changed=4 failed=0`.

verification.check: Exact-branch monitoring replay for Matrix HTTPS/TLS assurance
verification.observed: `make converge-monitoring` completed successfully after the committed Matrix HTTPS/TLS assurance artifacts were added, with final recap `backup-lv3 ok=14 changed=0 failed=0`, `coolify-lv3 ok=14 changed=0 failed=0`, `docker-build-lv3 ok=46 changed=0 failed=0`, `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=72 changed=2 failed=0`, `monitoring-lv3 ok=400 changed=11 failed=0`, `nginx-lv3 ok=150 changed=3 failed=0`, `postgres-lv3 ok=38 changed=0 failed=0`, and `proxmox-host ok=101 changed=3 failed=0`.

verification.check: Public and controller Matrix endpoint verification
verification.observed: `https://matrix.example.com/_matrix/client/versions` returned `status 200` from `server nginx` with `versions_count 20`; `http://100.64.0.1:8015/_matrix/client/versions` returned `status 200` with `server Synapse/1.150.0`; and `sudo ss -ltnp` on `proxmox-host` confirmed the controller listener is bound on `100.64.0.1:8015`.

verification.check: Admin login and runtime container health
verification.observed: Password login against `https://matrix.example.com/_matrix/client/v3/login` returned `status 200`, `user_id @ops:matrix.example.com`, `home_server matrix.example.com`, and well-known base `https://matrix.example.com/`. `sudo docker compose --file /opt/matrix-synapse/docker-compose.yml ps --format json` on `docker-runtime-lv3` showed `matrixdotorg/synapse:v1.150.0` in `running` state with status `Up About an hour (healthy)` and the `openbao-agent` sidecar healthy.

Prometheus on `monitoring-lv3` reported `matrix_rule_loaded True` and `matrix_target_active True` for assurance id `matrix-synapse-public`, and the live files were present at `/etc/prometheus/file_sd/https-tls-targets.yml` and `/etc/prometheus/rules/https-tls-alerts.yml`.

notes: The branch was rebased onto the latest fetched origin/main commit `8871117b40466b7907a33992f44ca7d83a3e9409` before the final live apply. During rebase, `config/workflow-catalog.json`, `build/platform-manifest.json`, and generated diagram artifacts were refreshed so ADR 0255 preserved the newer shared-catalog state from main.
The host-side controller proxy listens on the Tailscale address `100.64.0.1:8015`, not on `127.0.0.1:8015`, so host-local probes must target the Tailscale address.

This receipt records the branch-local live apply. The protected mainline surfaces still remain pending: `VERSION`, `changelog.md`, `README.md`, `versions/stack.yaml`, release notes, and a canonical exact-main receipt after merge to main.
